# Minjur Sandstone

**Summary**: Geological formation studied in the thesis collection.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2014-mohammedfaiz|Mohammedfaiz, 2014]] studied the Minjur Sandstone

- [[2022-radwan|Radwan, 2022]] analyzed samples from the Minjur sandstone to determine QCI values.

- [[2025-ahmed|Ahmed, 2025]] studied the minjur-sandstone to evaluate its suitability for carbon capture and storage.

## Depositional Environment



- [[2022-radwan|Radwan, 2022]] analyzed samples from the Minjur sandstone to determine QCI values.

- [[2025-ahmed|Ahmed, 2025]] studied the minjur-sandstone to evaluate its suitability for carbon capture and storage.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- studied the Minjur Sandstone ([[2014-mohammedfaiz|Mohammedfaiz, 2014]])

- Samples 1218-12 through 1218-18 showed QCI values ranging from 9.14 to 9.74. ([[2022-radwan|Radwan, 2022, p. 42]])

- The aquifer lies at depths exceeding 800 meters, meeting requirements for high-pressure CO2 storage. ([[2025-ahmed|Ahmed, 2025, p. 17]])
